name: Blackthorn Research
brandVoice: Dense, institutional, and unapologetically analytical. Reads like a hedge fund's internal strategy memo — not meant for a general audience. Assumes deep market literacy. Uses technical language without explanation. Every sentence carries information; zero filler. The voice of a CIO writing to their investment committee.
audienceProfile: Hedge fund portfolio managers, proprietary trading desks, and institutional allocators. They manage $100M+ and want differentiated analytical frameworks, not consensus repetition.
brandPositioning: Differentiated macro strategy research for institutions that think independently. We challenge consensus not for contrarianism's sake, but because consensus trades are crowded trades.
companyBackground: Founded in 2016 in New York by former Bridgewater macro strategist
Independent research firm with 340 institutional subscribers across 22 countries
Flagship 'Contrarian Alpha' publication has a documented track record of calling 7 of the last 9 major regime shifts
Annual Blackthorn Macro Summit in Greenwich CT, invitation-only, 200 attendees
Research team of 8 former sell-side strategists and 3 PhD economists
